name: NFPA 110 generator + ATS log-freshness audit (BIM-side only)
description: Audits BIM parameter timestamps only — does NOT trigger physical tests. NFPA 110 weekly load tests and monthly ATS transfer tests must be conducted and logged manually by the facilities team; this workflow verifies that those logs have been recorded in the model within the required intervals (generator ≤ 35 days, ATS ≤ 35 days, UPS battery ≤ 4 years).

steps.description: EesResilienceValidator: check EES_GEN_TEST_LOG_DT, EES_ATS_TEST_LOG_DT, and EES_UPS_BATTERY_DT freshness against NFPA 110 intervals — flags overdue logs only, does not perform or schedule physical tests
